What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Sliced red onions and green bell peppers lie in rings on a wooden cutting board alongside whole garlic bulbs and dried bay leaves. A small glass bowl holds yellow oil near a pile of black peppercorns and white salt. Yellow text overlay displays website URL and host name above the arranged raw cooking ingredients.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A man with graying hair wearing a black short-sleeved shirt stands behind a kitchen island manipulating a large piece of raw meat inside a black roasting pan. He sprinkles seasoning from a small container while a glass pitcher filled with yellow liquid sits on the counter to his left. Light wood cabinets and a white stove are visible in the background.

question: Outline the specific text overlays and food items visible during the first half versus the second half of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 1s, whole garlic bulbs and black peppercorns sit near sliced vegetables; at 5s, the host name Henry Arango appears in yellow font; at 11s, a title card lists Pork Shoulder as the main ingredient; at 15s, My Adobo mix is shown in white text; at 19s, twelve ounces of Chicken stock completes the list.
